title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password with at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message
User is redirected to the login or dashboard page

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter the email address 'existing@example.com'
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
No duplicate account is created

title: Account creation with password less than 8 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password with 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No account is created

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters is accepted
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., boundary@example.com)
Enter a password with exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message
User is redirected to the login or dashboard page

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., boundary@example.com)
Enter a password with exactly 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No account is created

title: Email uniqueness validation is performed before account creation
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter the email address 'existing@example.com'
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: The system checks for email uniqueness before creating the account
Account creation is rejected with an error message indicating duplicate email
No new account is created

title: Password length validation is performed before account creation
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password with 6 characters (e.g., Pass12)
Click the 'Create Account' button
expected_results: The system validates the password length before creating the account
Account creation is rejected with an error message indicating minimum password length requirement
No account is created

title: Race condition during concurrent account creation with same email
preconditions: No existing account with the email 'race@example.com'
System is ready to handle concurrent requests
test_steps: Send two or more concurrent account creation requests with the same email 'race@example.com' and valid passwords
Wait for all requests to complete
expected_results: Only one account is created with the email 'race@example.com'
All other requests are rejected with an appropriate error message (e.g., email already exists)
No duplicate accounts exist in the system
